title: The Magical Wonders of Mount Roraima

scenes.text: This flat-topped mountain seems to rise to the clouds.
This is Mount Roraima, located in Venezuela.
This ancient formation is over two billion years old.
The unique ecosystem here is home to many endemic species.
scenes.label: ENDANGERED SPECIES

scenes.text: Follow if you love to travel from your screen.

description: 📍 Mount Roraima, Venezuela. A mystical flat-topped mountain rich in biodiversity and unique formations. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
